series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, notes, reports, guidance, correspondence, and other documents filed with and related to the administration of the program or project.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: two (2) years completion of program or project, or superseded or obsolete. (Federal or state statutory or regulatory provisions applicable certain programs may affect record retention periods. In such cases, statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over retention language set forth in this schedule.) Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. Upon expiration of retention period: STATE ARCHIVE REVIEW IS REQUIRED state plans and official annual and final reports. ALL OTHER RECORDS IN THIS SERIES: retention period has elapsed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
